item.title: CMPS Stock Jumps 22% Pre-Market As Compass Sets Timeline For New Phase 3 Depression Trial Results
item.description: The company is currently conducting clinical trials of COMP360, a proprietary synthetic formulation of psilocybin, designed for treatment-resistant de...

item.title: Logan Paul's $16.5 Million Record Pokémon Card Auction Ignites ‘Slop Tokenization’ NFT Debate
item.description: Logan Paul sold a rare Pikachu Pokemon card for $16.5 million, setting a record for the collectible.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs Approach Longest Outflow Streak Since $5 Billion Selloff In March Last Year
item.description: Spot Bitcoin ETFs have recorded four consecutive weeks of net outflows totaling more than $3.4 billion.

item.title: Michael Burry Turns Up Heat On Palantir, Calls Out Alleged ‘Covert Smearing Campaigns’ By CEO Alex Karp
item.description: The famed investor, who disclosed a short position in PLTR last year, has forecasted a steep stock correction.

item.title: Why Is CRSR Stock Pulling Back After Its Biggest Rally On Record?
item.description: While full-year 2026 revenue guidance came in below consensus, EPS guidance for both Q1 and the full year topped expectations.
